subject: english
learning_objectives: Identify basic stress tendencies listed in the note
Apply stress guidance to multisyllabic words

sections.heading: Definition
sections.content: English words have fixed stress patterns, so learners must pay attention to where stress falls in pronunciation.

sections.heading: Guiding Rules
sections.content: The note groups examples under words stressed on the second syllable from the end, the third syllable from the end, and the final syllable, and provides sample words for each pattern.
